summary: Frontend-only regression + feature test for ProNetworx pages (/pro and /pro/directory) + nav/footer/regression. All 18 assertions PASS with 0 console errors across 8 routes. Verified hero text, 8 disciplines, 6 features, free/pro pricing cards & buttons, directory search filter (lagos -> 1 Nova Lyra), role filter (photographer -> Mike + Cyrus), filter-all restore, directory-cta back-nav, footer Pro + Directory links, and regression on /, /radio, /artists, /schedule, /about, /contact (nav + footer present, RadioPlayer visible).
critical_code_review_comments: Dynamic Tailwind class names like `text-${color}`, `border-${color}/40`, `bg-${color}/10` in ProPage.jsx (lines 136-137, 175-178) are NOT picked up by Tailwind's JIT scanner unless safelisted. The runtime classes resolve via `colorClass()` to literal `cyan-300`/`pink-400`/`yellow-300` but Tailwind builds based on static string match — confirm tailwind.config.js has a safelist for these color permutations or the icons/borders may silently fall back to no-color in production builds. Visually rendered OK in preview so likely already safelisted, but worth verifying for prod.
ProPage.jsx ICONS imports `Infinity as InfinityIcon` and stores under key 'Infinity' (lines 5, 15). Works but slightly confusing — consider renaming the data key to 'InfinityIcon' for clarity.

ProDirectoryPage.jsx ROLES list is derived from directory order (line 7), so filter order depends on data order rather than disciplines order. Minor: consider sorting alphabetically or aligning with disciplines list for consistent UX.

Footer 'Pro-Networx' and 'Directory' links lack `data-testid` attributes (Footer.jsx lines 43-44) — relied on href selectors for testing. Adding testids (e.g., footer-link-pro, footer-link-directory) would improve test stability.
Directory cards use Pexels images with only 3 unique source URLs reused across 12 catalysts (proData.js) — many cards visually duplicate. Acceptable for mock data but worth noting if/when going live.
seed_data_creation: None — all data is local mock from proData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProNetworx pages are stable. Note: Reveal animations are IntersectionObserver-based, so always scroll through the page (window.scrollTo) before counting `directory-card-*` or `discipline-card-*` elements; without scrolling, only the first ~10 cards mount. Filter testids follow pattern `directory-filter-{role-kebab-lower}` with full role list: all, graphic-designer, photographer, beat-maker, videographer, lyricist, illustrator, engineer, stylist. Lagos search => 1 catalyst (Nova Lyra). Photographer filter => 2 (Mike Castro id=2, Cyrus North id=10).
